response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience with the mandatory C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise. Their experience is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and full-stack development, which may not align closely with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and software development experience with a focus on testability and modern practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Strong communication skills, evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages, frameworks, and domains (e.g., GIS, real-time systems).
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, particularly on Windows.
No demonstrated experience in fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domains.
SQL experience appears limited (e.g., no mention of SQL Server or Oracle, only MongoDB and MySQL).
